1708500.name: Glyph Soundtrack
1708500.description:
Since Glyph was released on Nintendo Switch in February 2021, people have been praising the music to the moon and back.

Therefore, we thought it only right to celebrate the PC release of Glyph by releasing a special EP featuring some of our favorite tracks from the game.

Some of the tracks are reworked and altered melodies from the levels and will feel new and fresh, yet recognizable. Other tracks are taken directly from the game. For example, the heavy boss fighting track.

All the best from,
Frederik Keglberg
Glyph Composer
